question_text:
Paint House

There is a row of n houses, where each house can be painted one of three colors: red, blue, or green.
output_format: Minimum cost to paint all houses
explanation: DP: dp[i][color] is the minimum cost to paint house i with specified color. Transition: dp[i][0] = cost[i][0] + min(dp[i-1][1], dp[i-1][2]).
